case_title: JAN BROWN & ASSOCIATES VS SELBY, MANTON II ESQ. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $111.60 FILED BY JAN BROWN & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ. LAW OFFICES OF MANTON SELBY, II ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAN BROWN & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ. LAW OFFICES OF MANTON SELBY, II $111.60 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $157.60, NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISMISSED AS TO DEFT. LAW OFFICES OF MANTON SELBY II, W/O PREJUDICE; NO SERVICE.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ. HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S DECL:TO ADD TO CLAIM REASON"+INT.&COURT COSTS".
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.71 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ. HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2002 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-12-2002 AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2002, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: AUG-07-2002 AS TO DEFENDANT SELBY, MANTON  II  ESQ.
